Princeton WordNet reference notice

Project:
https://wordnet.princeton.edu/

Repository usage note:
- WordNet-family notices are relevant when Japanese WordNet or NLTK-based
  corpora are used as upstream lexical inputs
- raw Princeton WordNet data is not bundled directly in this repository

Before redistributing raw WordNet-family corpora, consult the upstream
WordNet license text on the Princeton WordNet site and keep the required
copyright and disclaimer notices.
